---
toc: false
description: "Sustainability Lab at IIT Gandhinagar — AI-driven research for a sustainable future. Led by Prof. Nipun Batra. PhD positions available in AI for sustainability, health sensing, energy analytics, and environmental monitoring."
---

<div class="hero-section">
<p style="margin-bottom: 16px;"><a href="openings.qmd" style="display:inline-block; background: rgba(196,69,54,0.10); color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 6px 16px; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none;">🎓 Now recruiting PhD students &amp; interns →</a></p>
<h1>AI for a Sustainable Future</h1>
<p class="tagline">We build AI that serves both people and the planet — from air quality and health sensing to energy and Earth observation.</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="openings.qmd" class="hero-btn primary">Join the Lab</a>
<a href="papers/index.qmd" class="hero-btn secondary">View Research</a>
<a href="flyer.pdf" class="hero-btn secondary" target="_blank">Lab Flyer</a>
</div>
</div>

```{=html}
<style>
.proof-band { max-width: 1000px; margin: -8px auto 54px; padding: 0 8px; }
.proof-awards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 26px; }
.proof-award { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-top: 3px solid var(--accent); border-radius: var(--radius-medium); padding: 15px 18px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); text-decoration: none; transition: transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; }
.proof-award:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); text-decoration: none; }
.proof-award .pa-icon { font-size: 1.7rem; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pa-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.proof-award strong { color: var(--ink); font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.2; }
.proof-award small { color: var(--muted); font-size: .8rem; margin-top: 3px; }
.proof-venues { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 26px; }
.proof-label { display: block; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .14em; font-size: .72rem; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 10px; }
.proof-venues .pv { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink); }
.proof-venues .pv + .pv::before { content: '·'; color: var(--accent); margin: 0 12px; font-family: 'Work Sans', sans-serif; }
.proof-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-top: 1px solid var(--line); padding-top: 22px; }
.proof-pi { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 13px; }
.proof-pi img { width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; border: 2px solid var(--accent); }
.proof-pi .pa-text strong { color: var(--ink); font-size: .92rem; }
.proof-pi .pa-text small { color: var(--muted); font-size: .8rem; margin-top: 2px; }
.proof-alumni { text-align: center; max-width: 470px; }
.proof-alumni .proof-label { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 5px; }
.proof-alumni-list a { color: var(--muted); font-size: .85rem; line-height: 1.5; text-decoration: none; }
.proof-alumni-list a:hover { color: var(--accent); }
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .proof-awards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .proof-venues .pv { font-size: 1.05rem; }
  .proof-venues .pv + .pv::before { margin: 0 7px; }
  .proof-foot { gap: 20px; }
}
</style>

<div class="proof-band">

<div class="proof-awards">
<a class="proof-award" href="awards.qmd">
<span class="pa-icon">🏆</span>
<span class="pa-text"><strong>ACM eEnergy Test-of-Time Award</strong><small>2025 · for NILMTK</small></span>
</a>
<a class="proof-award" href="awards.qmd">
<span class="pa-icon">🌟</span>
<span class="pa-text"><strong>ACM SIGEnergy Rising Star</strong><small>2025</small></span>
</a>
<a class="proof-award" href="awards.qmd">
<span class="pa-icon">🥈</span>
<span class="pa-text"><strong>BuildSys 2026 Best Paper</strong><small>Runner-Up · NILMBench</small></span>
</a>
</div>

<div class="proof-venues">
<span class="proof-label">Our research appears at</span>
<span class="pv">NeurIPS</span><span class="pv">KDD</span><span class="pv">AAAI</span><span class="pv">IMWUT</span><span class="pv">BuildSys</span><span class="pv">UbiComp</span>
</div>

<div class="proof-foot">
<div class="proof-pi">
<img src="https://nipunbatra.github.io/images/nipun.jpg" alt="Prof. Nipun Batra" loading="lazy">
<span class="pa-text"><strong>Led by Prof. Nipun Batra</strong><small>Associate Professor, Computer Science, IIT Gandhinagar</small></span>
</div>
<div class="proof-alumni">
<span class="proof-label">Our alumni are at</span>
<div class="proof-alumni-list"><a href="alumni.qmd">Cambridge · Microsoft Research · Google DeepMind · CMU · Oracle · Nykaa</a></div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
.pillars { max-width: 1000px; margin: 8px auto 56px; }
.pillars-head { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 26px; }
.pillars-head h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; color: var(--ink); font-size: 2rem; margin: 0 0 6px; }
.pillars-head p { color: var(--muted); margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; }
.pillars-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 16px; }
.pillar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: var(--radius-medium); padding: 22px 20px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); text-decoration: none; transition: transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; }
.pillar:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); text-decoration: none; }
.pillar-icon { font-size: 2.1rem; line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.pillar h3 { color: var(--ink); font-size: 1.15rem; margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; }
.pillar p { color: var(--muted); font-size: .85rem; line-height: 1.45; margin: 0 0 14px; flex: 1; }
.pillar .pillar-cta { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; font-size: .84rem; }
.pillars-all { text-align: center; margin-top: 20px; }
.pillars-all a { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; font-size: .95rem; text-decoration: none; }
@media (max-width: 820px) { .pillars-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
@media (max-width: 470px) { .pillars-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
</style>
<div class="pillars">
<div class="pillars-head">
<h2>What We Work On</h2>
<p>Four research areas where we build AI for real-world sustainability.</p>
</div>
<div class="pillars-grid">
<a class="pillar" href="projects.html?tag=air-quality">
<span class="pillar-icon">🌫️</span>
<h3>Air Quality</h3>
<p>Low-cost sensing, satellite AI, and forecasting for cleaner air across cities.</p>
<span class="pillar-cta">Explore projects &rarr;</span>
</a>
<a class="pillar" href="projects.html?tag=health-sensing">
<span class="pillar-icon">🫁</span>
<h3>Health Sensing</h3>
<p>Wearables and thermal imaging for respiratory and metabolic health.</p>
<span class="pillar-cta">Explore projects &rarr;</span>
</a>
<a class="pillar" href="projects.html?tag=nilm">
<span class="pillar-icon">⚡</span>
<h3>Energy &amp; NILM</h3>
<p>Energy disaggregation and smart-grid ML — knowing what draws power, and when.</p>
<span class="pillar-cta">Explore projects &rarr;</span>
</a>
<a class="pillar" href="projects.html?tag=computer-vision">
<span class="pillar-icon">🛰️</span>
<h3>Earth Observation</h3>
<p>Detecting brick kilns and mapping land use from satellite imagery.</p>
<span class="pillar-cta">Explore projects &rarr;</span>
</a>
</div>
<div class="pillars-all"><a href="projects.html">Browse all projects &rarr;</a></div>
</div>
```

## Featured Research

<p class="section-subtitle">Cutting-edge projects at the intersection of AI and sustainability</p>

<div class="featured-projects">

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/JoulesEye_1.png" alt="JoulesEye Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>JoulesEye</h3>
<p>Revolutionary energy expenditure estimation and respiration sensing from thermal imagery during exercise.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Health Sensing</span>
<span class="tag">Thermal Imaging</span>
<span class="tag">AI/ML</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/jouleseye/" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/SpiroMask.png" alt="SpiroMask Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>SpiroMask</h3>
<p>Smart respiratory monitoring system transforming regular face masks into health sensing devices.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Healthcare</span>
<span class="tag">IoT</span>
<span class="tag">Respiratory Health</span>
</div>
<a href="https://dl.acm.org/doi/fullHtml/10.1145/3570167" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/I_Dont_Know.png" alt="I Do Not Know Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>"I do not know"</h3>
<p>Quantifying Uncertainty in Neural Network Based Approaches for Non-Intrusive Load Monitoring</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">NILM</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Uncertainty</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/VibhutiBansal-11/NILM_Uncertainty" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/sentinelkilndb.png" alt="SentinelKilnDB Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>SentinelKilnDB</h3>
<p>A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for OBB Brick Kiln Detection in South Asia Using Satellite Imagery.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Computer Vision</span>
<span class="tag">Earth Observation</span>
<!-- <span class="tag">Environmental</span> -->
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/sentinelkilndb/" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>


<div class="project-card">
<img src="images/mainpage/space-to-policy.png" alt="Space to Policy Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Space to Policy</h3>
<p>Using satellite imagery and AI to monitor environmental compliance and inform policy decisions.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Satellite Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/brick-kilns/" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2024/VayuBuddy_diagram.png" alt="VayuBuddy Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>VayuBuddy</h3>
<p>An LLM-powered chatbot system to reduce the barrier between the stakeholders and air quality sensor data</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://sustainability-lab.github.io/vayubuddy/" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/compass-india.png" alt="Samachar Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Samachar</h3>
<p>Print News Media on Air Pollution in India - analyzing how air quality is covered in Indian print media.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality</span>
<span class="tag">NLP</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/karm-patel/Samachar-News-media-on-air-pollution" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2022/Scalable_GaussianProcesses.png" alt="Gaussian Processes Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Accurate and Scalable Gaussian Processes</h3>
<p>Machine learning approach for fine-grained air quality inference using Gaussian processes at scale.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality</span>
<span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
<span class="tag">Gaussian Processes</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/patel-zeel/AAAI22" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>


<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2014/ACM-energy14_NILMTK.png" alt="NILMTK Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>NILMTK</h3>
<p>An Open Source Toolkit for Non-intrusive Load Monitoring - pioneering framework for energy disaggregation research.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">NILM</span>
<span class="tag">Toolkit</span>
<span class="tag">Open Source</span>
</div>
<a href="https://github.com/nilmtk/nilmtk" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="papers/2023/airdelhi.png" alt="AirDelhi Project" class="project-image">
<div class="project-content">
<h3>AirDelhi</h3>
<p>A fine-grained air quality dataset from mobile sensors on Delhi buses, enabling better pollution monitoring.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
<span class="tag">Air Quality Data</span>
<span class="tag">Policy</span>
<span class="tag">Environmental</span>
</div>
<a href="https://neurips.cc/virtual/2023/poster/73476" class="project-link">Learn More →</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 30px;">
<a href="papers/index.qmd" class="project-link" style="font-size: 1.1rem;">View All Publications →</a>
</div>

## Funding Partners

<div class="funders-grid">

::: {.funder-block}
![Google](images/funders/google.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Cisco](images/funders/cisco.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![NVIDIA](images/funders/nvidia.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Microsoft](images/funders/microsoft.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![SERB](images/funders/serb.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![MOES](images/funders/moes.jpeg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![DST](images/funders/dst.jpg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![STARS](images/funders/stars.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Government of Gujarat Science](images/funders/gujcost.png){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![CoE in AI (MHRD)](images/funders/coe-ai-mhrd.svg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Gujarat Forest Department](images/funders/gfd.jpeg){.funder-logo}
:::

::: {.funder-block}
![Jio](images/funders/jio.png){.funder-logo}
:::

</div>

## Connect

<div style="text-align: center; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 1.1rem;">
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@SustainabilityLab-SL" target="_blank" class="project-link">Lab YouTube</a> | 
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/@NipunBatra0" target="_blank" class="project-link">Teaching YouTube</a> | 
<a href="https://x.com/nipun_batra" target="_blank" class="project-link">Twitter</a> | 
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nipunbatra0/" target="_blank" class="project-link">LinkedIn</a>
</div>

<div class="join-section">
<h2>Join Our Mission</h2>
<p>Embark on a journey to drive innovation in sustainability through cutting-edge AI research.</p>

<div class="join-buttons">
<a href="openings.qmd" class="join-btn primary">View Positions</a>
<a href="upskilling.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Research Skills Bootcamp</a>
<a href="lab_culture.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Our Culture</a>
<a href="members.qmd" class="join-btn secondary">Meet the Team</a>
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 30px; font-size: 0.9rem; opacity: 0.8;">
<p><strong>Ready to make an impact?</strong></p>
</div>
</div>
